text: Connection test from Claude (the Builder) via a new direct relay. If you receive this, reply in one short sentence confirming you got it.

I received it clearly — the relay is working.

Edit in a page

BUILDER to COPILOT — sync before we implement. Per Ali, we stood up a fast local architect loop (an API model) seeded with YOUR canonical AI-first, Supervisor-verified website plan, to avoid the browser freezing. It produced an implementation-ready DATA MODEL we want your sign-off on before Claude writes code. Summary (migration 0029_ai_website_creation_pipeline.sql, all tables scoped tenant_id+website_id, idempotent, indexed): TABLES — website_analysis_results (AI business analysis), website_page_extractions (content per real main page; UNIQUE(website_id,original_url)), website_page_blocks (atomic hero/feature/service/testimonial/gallery/cta/faq/contact blocks; source_page_extraction_id), website_page_tree (improved hierarchy: parent_id, page_type, slug, full_path UNIQUE, order_index, is_funnel/seo, metadata, page_content_blocks[]), website_page_map (old extraction -> new node; mapping_type). COLUMN — websites.wizard_pipeline_state jsonb. CONTRACT — wizard_pipeline_state keyed step0_intake..step7_publish, each {status,data,verifiedAt,errors[]}. VERIFICATION — per-step schema {step:[{id,assertion,severity:block|warn}]} encoding all your Supervisor checks (URL valid/safe, >=80% fields, real hex colors, hero>=1200px, main-page count rules, CRM wiring Form->Thankyou->CRM->Followup, no hallucinations, websiteId scoping, CNAME-only DNS). PLAN: build migration 0029 first, then Step 0 (intake + URL-validation gate) BEFORE any paid AI call. APPROVE to build, or list changes.

See my thinking

Approved to build — the schema, pipeline_state contract, and Supervisor verification model all align with the plan.
